title: Tensions in the Strait of Hormuz raise the risk of oil supply disruption
summary: The United States attacks Iranian positions and inspects oil tankers in the Gulf of Oman, while Chevron plans a pipeline to avoid a possible closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Netflix disappoints in revenue and its stock falls 9% after quarterly results
summary: The streaming company beat expected profit but revenue missed estimates, causing a temporary 9% drop in its share price.

title: Trump Media to sell priority access to Trump's messages to investors
summary: Trump's social network will offer banks and investment funds a paid service to receive the president's posts before the public, generating criticism about market fairness.

title: Semiconductor stocks plummet on fears of oversupply and falling demand
summary: The SOX semiconductor index falls 4% and companies like Sandisk and Corning record double-digit losses due to concerns about excess supply and sector slowdown.

title: SpaceX falls below its IPO price after initial record
summary: SpaceX, which debuted on the stock market with great anticipation, sees its stock fall below the IPO price, puzzling analysts.

title: Tokyo Stock Exchange falls dragged down by global tech downturn
summary: The Nikkei and Topix fell, affected by the semiconductor crash on Wall Street and skepticism about artificial intelligence.

title: Digi debuts on the stock market with volatility and closes with an 8% drop
summary: The telecommunications operator started trading at 5.60 euros but the initial euphoria faded, closing in the red on its first day.

title: Energy IPOs soar due to the rise of artificial intelligence
summary: The growing demand for electricity for AI data centers is driving the IPOs of energy companies, seeking to capitalize on infrastructure needs.

title: TSMC reports record quarterly revenue of $40.2 billion
summary: The world's leading chipmaker exceeds expectations and strengthens positive outlook for Nvidia and the semiconductor sector.

title: Warren Buffett reveals that he bet on Alphabet and criticizes market gambling
summary: The billionaire investor clarifies that the bet on Alphabet was his, and states that the current market prefers speculative gambling to serious investing.

title: Alphabet delays its AI model and doubts about the sector increase
summary: Alphabet's decision to postpone its new AI model causes stock market falls and adds to doubts about the sustainability of the technology sector rally.

title: Crypto.com reaches a valuation of $20 billion and Bitcoin rises slightly
summary: Citadel Securities' investment boosts Crypto.com's valuation, while Bitcoin advances slightly and crypto stocks rise.

title: Russian attacks threaten Ukrainian grain exports
summary: The Russian offensive puts at risk cereal exports from Ukraine, essential for global food supply.

title: Dassault Systèmes negotiates purchase of clinical trial software company
summary: The French company seeks to expand in the pharmaceutical sector by acquiring a firm specialized in clinical trial software.

title: Verizon to close 274 stores in the US and lay off 500 employees
summary: The telecommunications operator restructures its distribution network and reduces its corporate workforce to adapt to the current market.

title: PwC fined 3 million for failures in Babcock audit
summary: The British accounting regulator sanctions the consultancy for deficiencies in the review of defense group Babcock's accounts.

title: Downing Street gathers private equity executives to boost IPOs in London
summary: The British government seeks solutions to revitalize the IPO market on the London Stock Exchange in a meeting with private equity leaders.

title: New York freezes permits for AI data centers due to energy cost
summary: The regulatory measure could hinder the growth of AI infrastructure and affect investment in the technology sector.

title: Opinion article declares the death of ESG investing
summary: The sustainable investment trend loses momentum amid criticism of its effectiveness and impact measurement.

title: Chinese airlines warn of heavy losses ahead of uncertain summer
summary: Chinese airlines anticipate negative results due to weak demand and rising costs during the summer season.
